name: Strapatsada (Mediterranean Vegetable-Egg Dish)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red peppers, or green bell pepper and/or zucchini and/or green beans and/or mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Sauté onion until soft.
3. Add the chosen vegetables and sauté until tender but not mushy.
4. Stir in tomato with the beaten eggs.
5. If using halloumi, add it now and season lightly (no salt if using cheese).
6. Stir until lightly scrambled.
7. Divide into 6 servings.
8. Serve hot with lemon wedges.
Calories without cheese: 71
1/2 medium fat meat
1/2 vegetable
1/2 fat
Diabetic Cooking from Around the World - Vilma Liacouras Chantiles
